CorrelationCoefficient.description: CorrelationCoefficient represents a Pearson correlation between a REIT sector and a FRED indicator.

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

FredIndicatorSnapshot.description: FredIndicatorSnapshot captures a FRED indicator's current value and recent change.

GetReitCorrelationRequest.description: GetReitCorrelationRequest has no required parameters — returns full correlation data.

GetReitCorrelationResponse.description: GetReitCorrelationResponse contains macro correlation data for the REIT market.

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of when correlation data was last computed.

regime.description: Macro regime classification for the REIT market.

yieldSpread.description: REIT-vs-Bond yield spread: average REIT dividend yield minus 10Y Treasury yield.

GetReitSocialSentimentRequest.description: GetReitSocialSentimentRequest specifies optional filters for social sentiment data.

reitSymbol.description: Filter by REIT symbol. Empty returns all REITs.

GetReitSocialSentimentResponse.description: GetReitSocialSentimentResponse contains social sentiment data for REITs.

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of when social data was last collected.

stale.description: True when social data is stale or unavailable (Google Places API down/budget exceeded).

unavailableReason.description: Human-readable message when data is unavailable.

ListReitPropertiesRequest.description: ListReitPropertiesRequest specifies optional filters for property locations.

reitSymbol.description: Filter by REIT symbol. Empty returns all REITs.

sector.description: Filter by sector. Empty returns all sectors.

ListReitPropertiesResponse.description: ListReitPropertiesResponse contains property locations and exposure summaries.

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of when property data was last updated.

ListReitQuotesRequest.description: ListReitQuotesRequest specifies optional filters for REIT quotes.

market.description: Filter by market: "us", "china". Empty returns all markets.

sector.description: Filter by sector (e.g., "retail", "industrial"). Empty returns all sectors.

items.description: Filter by specific ticker symbols. Empty returns all symbols.

ListReitQuotesResponse.description: ListReitQuotesResponse contains REIT quotes plus market intelligence.

aiBriefing.description: AI-generated morning briefing (3 paragraphs summarizing market + social + geo signals).

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of when the data was last refreshed.

regime.description: Macro regime classification for the REIT market.

stale.description: True when upstream data was unavailable and cached data was returned.

ReitExposureSummary.description: ReitExposureSummary provides per-REIT natural disaster exposure data.

hurricaneCorridorCount.description: Number of properties in hurricane corridors.

seismicZoneCount.description: Number of properties in seismic zones.

wildfireRiskCount.description: Number of properties in wildfire risk areas.

ReitProperty.description: ReitProperty represents a physical property location owned by a REIT.

ReitQuote.description: ReitQuote represents a REIT stock quote with sector classification and risk metrics.

disasterExposureScore.description: Natural disaster exposure score (0-100, computed from property proximity to earthquakes/fires/hurricanes).

dividendYield.description: Annual dividend yield as a percentage.

ReitSocial.description: ReitSocial represents social sentiment data for a single REIT.

items.description: Top negative keywords from recent reviews.
Top positive keywords from recent reviews.

reviewVelocity.description: Review velocity: month-over-month percentage change in review count.

items.description: Tenant risk signals (e.g., "Express: store closing mentions accelerating").

SectorRotationSignal.description: SectorRotationSignal indicates whether to overweight or underweight a REIT sector.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description:
GetReitCorrelation retrieves macro correlation data: FRED indicators, Pearson coefficients,
 regime classification, sector rotation signals, and REIT-vs-bond yield spread.

GetReitSocialSentiment retrieves social health scores, review velocity trends,
 and tenant risk signals from Google Places and Yelp data.

parameters.description: Filter by REIT symbol. Empty returns all REITs.
parameters.name: reit_symbol

get.description:
ListReitProperties retrieves curated property locations for map rendering
 with per-REIT natural disaster exposure scores.

parameters.description: Filter by sector. Empty returns all sectors.
parameters.name: sector

parameters.description: Filter by REIT symbol. Empty returns all REITs.
parameters.name: reit_symbol

get.description: ListReitQuotes retrieves REIT stock quotes by sector with regime signal and AI briefing.

parameters.description: Filter by sector (e.g., "retail", "industrial"). Empty returns all sectors.
parameters.name: sector

parameters.description: Filter by specific ticker symbols. Empty returns all symbols.
parameters.name: symbols

parameters.description: Filter by market: "us", "china". Empty returns all markets.
parameters.name: market
